Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPLOC1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Organization READ;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DIQ 10090 ; DVPXUTL ; RDLOC(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N ARRAY,DVPLOC N X F X="locationId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; I $G(LOCATION)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Location Identifier is required.","RDLOC^DVPLOC1") ; I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(LOCATION,"RDLOC^DVPLOC1") G QUIT I +$P(LOCATION,":",5)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied locationId: "_LOCATION_" has an invalid format.","RDLOC^DVPLOC1") ; I $P($G(LOCATION),":",5)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Location Identifier: "_LOCATION_" does not have the correct format.","RDLOC^DVPLOC1") ; S IEN=$P($G(LOCATION),":",5) D GETS^DIQ(44,IEN_",",".01","","ARRAY") I $D(ARRAY)'=10 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Location record found for locationId: "_LOCATION_".","RDLOC^DVPLOC1") ; D FHIRLOC(LOCATION,.DVPLOC,0) M @TARGET@("results","resource")=DVPLOC QUIT ; Q ; FHIRLOC(LOCATION,TARGET,SMRY) ; N FMIEN S FMIEN=$P(LOCATION,":",5)_"," N ARRAY D GETS^DIQ(44,FMIEN_",","2505;2506;.01;99;99.1;10;3","I","ARRAY") ; identifier S TARGET("id")=LOCATION S TARGET("identifier",1,"use")="usual" S TARGET("identifier",1,"system")="http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien" S TARGET("identifier",1,"value")=LOCATION ; type I $$GET1^DIQ(44,FMIEN,2)'="" S TARGET("type")=$$GET1^DIQ(44,FMIEN,2) ; status N INACT,ACT S (INACT,ACT)=0 I $G(ARRAY(44,FMIEN,2505))["" S INACT=ARRAY(44,FMIEN,2505,"I") I $G(ARRAY(44,FMIEN,2506))["" S ACT=ARRAY(44,FMIEN,2506,"I") S TARGET("status")=$S(ACT>=INACT:"active",1:"inactive") ; name S TARGET("name")=ARRAY(44,FMIEN,.01,"I") ; telecom I 'SMRY,ARRAY(44,FMIEN,99,"I")]"" D . N X,TELECOM S X=ARRAY(44,FMIEN,99,"I") I ARRAY(44,FMIEN,99.1,"I")]"" S X=X_" ext: "_ARRAY(44,FMIEN,99.1,"I") . S X="phone"_U_X_U_U_U_U . D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.TELECOM,X) . M TARGET("telecom")=TELECOM ; address I 'SMRY,ARRAY(44,FMIEN,10,"I")'="" D . S TARGET("address","type")="physical" . S TARGET("address","text")=ARRAY(44,FMIEN,10,"I") ; managingOrganization I ARRAY(44,FMIEN,3,"I")'="" D . S TARGET("managingOrganization")=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("organization","",ARRAY(44,FMIEN,3,"I")) Q
